text: Introducing argo preview. After your first pipeline run, open a browser-based viewer to iterate on voiceover, overlays, and timing — without re-recording a single frame.

overlay.title: argo preview
overlay.body: Edit voiceover, overlays, and timing — without re-recording.

text: Your recorded video plays right in the browser, with aligned audio synced to the timeline. Scrub anywhere to jump to any moment.

overlay.text: Video and audio play in sync — scrub the timeline to jump around

text: Every scene from your demo appears in the sidebar. Click any scene card to jump directly to it. The active scene highlights automatically as the video plays.

overlay.text: Click any scene to jump to it

text: Edit voiceover text right in the browser. Change a word, rephrase a sentence, fix pronunciation. Your edits save directly to the scenes manifest file.

overlay.text: Edit voiceover text inline — changes save to your manifest

text: Swap overlay templates and zones with simple dropdowns. Switch from a lower-third to a headline card, move it from bottom center to top right — all live.

overlay.text: Swap overlay templates and zones with dropdowns

text: Hit Regen tee tee ess on any scene to regenerate just that clip. No need to re-run the entire pipeline for a single word change. Surgical updates in seconds.

overlay.title: Regen TTS
overlay.body: Regenerate just one scene — no need to re-run the full pipeline.

text: Hit Save and your changes write directly to your scenes manifest file on disk. No copy-paste, no manual syncing.

overlay.text: Save writes directly to your scenes manifest

text: Toggle audio and overlay visibility with checkboxes. Preview the video with or without narration, with or without overlays — however you like.

overlay.text: Toggle audio and overlays on or off

text: That's argo preview. Edit, regen, save, repeat — all from your browser. Try it with npx argo preview.

overlay.title: npx argo preview my-demo
overlay.body: Iterate on voiceover, overlays, and timing — all from your browser.
